Metadata.CommitMsg:
feat: add local scan scripts mirroring the CI pipeline

scripts/
  scan-secrets.sh   # detect-secrets diff vs baseline
  scan-sast.sh      # Brakeman + Semgrep (Ruby + security-audit rulesets)
  scan-sca.sh       # bundler-audit + Trivy fs (CRITICAL gate)
  scan-image.sh     # Hadolint + Trivy config + Trivy image OS+libs
  scan-dast.sh      # Container boot + ZAP baseline (High-risk gate)
  generate-sbom.sh  # Syft (CycloneDX + SPDX) + Grype --fail-on critical
  scan-all.sh       # Orchestrator: runs all 6, full report on failure

Tools that aren't installed locally (brakeman, bundler-audit, trivy,
hadolint, syft, grype, ZAP) run from their official Docker images.
This keeps the scripts portable: same invocation locally and in CI,
no host-side toolchain required beyond docker + jq + openssl.

Per-tool gating thresholds match the spec table (decision 3.5):
  detect-secrets   any new finding
  Brakeman         High confidence
  Semgrep          ERROR level
  bundler-audit    Critical CVE
  Trivy fs         Critical
  Trivy image OS   Critical
  Trivy image libs High+Critical
  Hadolint         error level (config in .hadolint.yaml)
  Trivy config     Critical
  ZAP baseline     High alert
  Grype            Critical (--fail-on critical)
Metadata.Author: Setounkpe7 <mdoubogan@yahoo.fr>
